summary: Blog application where users can post blog posts. Admin access restriction for posting has been removed.

existing_features.title: Remove any frontend admin access guards on the Create and Edit blog post pages (CreateBlogPostPage and EditBlogPostPage) so that any authenticated user can navigate to and submit these pages without being blocked or redirected by an admin check.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove admin access requirement for posting blog posts

Remove the admin-only authorization check on the backend createBlogPost (and updateBlogPost if applicable) functions so that any authenticated user can create and publish blog posts without needing admin privileges.
